title: Making a Sandwich with Promise Chaining

content.problemStatement:
Complete the functions below so that each one **returns a Promise** resolving after $1$ second: \
1.`getBread()` → resolves with `"Bread ready"`. \
2.`addFilling(message)` → resolves with `" -> Filling added"`. \
3.`serveSandwich(message)` → resolves with `" -> Sandwich served"`. \
4. Then **chain the promises** so the steps run in order and log the final message. Use `.catch()` to handle any errors.

**Expected Output**:
```dsx
Bread ready -> Filling added -> Sandwich served
```
